exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg from 70 — 3x8 at RPE 7 last time, ready to progress.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Hold bodyweight — 4x5 at RPE 8. Try a 6th rep on set 1 if it feels strong.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Hold — 3x10 at RPE 9 last time. Get all sets clean at RPE<=8 before adding.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Hold — last set dropped to 8 at RPE 10. Aim 4x10 clean before adding.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Logged 35kg x15 at RPE 8 (machine scales by 5kg). Hold 35; try 40 only if set 1 feels <=RPE 8.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel
exercises.notes: Failed last session (shoulders + lower back). If lower back complains, sub Cable Crunch 2-3x10 at 70kg like last time.
